dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6587 IH: Veterans Earned Transportation Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Panetta (for himself, Mr. Fitzpatrick, and Mr. Lieu) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to make permanent the authority of the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to provide transportation to and from Department of Veterans Affairs facilities in connection with vocational rehabilitation or counseling.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Veterans Earned Transportation Act or the Vets ETA.

section.header: Permanent authority for Secretary of Veterans Affairs to provide transportation to and from Department of Veterans Affairs facilities in connection with vocational rehabilitation or counseling
section.text: Section 111A(a) of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking (1) The Secretary and inserting The Secretary; and
